intent_precise: Illumina DNA Prep: Using sample_plate_mag (pcr_plate, slot 1), reservoir (reservoir, slot 2), reservoir (deep_well_plate, slot 2), reagent_plate (plate, slot 3). (5) Pause: Ready (6) Mix 3 times at 20µL. (7) Transfer from source to destination. (8) Mix TagMixRep times. (9) Mix 3 times at 20µL. (10) Transfer from source to destination. (11) Mix TagMixRep times. (12) Mix 3 times at 20µL. (13) Transfer from source to destination. (14) Mix TagMixRep times. (15) Pause: Seal, Run TAG (15min) (16) Close thermocycler lid. (17) Run thermocycler profile for 1 cycles. (18) Set temperature to 10°C. (19) Open thermocycler lid. (20) Pause: Remove Seal (21) Pause: Seal, Run ERAT (60min) (22) Pause: Add TSB to Reagent Wells (23) Transfer from source to destination. (24) Mix TSBMixRep times. intent_concise: Perform magnetic bead separation, temperature control (4°C, 10°C), thermocycling. (volumes 10µL-200µL, ~44 min total)
intent: For this Illumina DNA Prep protocol, you'll be working with a sample plate in slot 1, reservoirs and deep well plate in slot 2, and reagent plate in slot 3, using the magnetic module, temperature module, and thermocycler throughout the process. Start by setting the temperature module to 4°C and preparing the thermocycler, then perform the tagmentation step by mixing samples 3 times at 20µL volumes, transferring reagents, and running the TAG program for 15 minutes, followed by the ERAT program for 60 minutes. Next, you'll do bead cleanups using magnetic separation at decreasing heights (8.5mm, 7mm, then 5mm) with 1-minute incubations at each height, transferring 10µL supernatants with 6-second waits between transfers, then wash with TWB buffer 100µL transfers and mix cycles. Finally, complete the PCR amplification with barcode addition, run the thermocycler for 25 minutes (1 cycle, then 5 cycles, then 1 cycle), and finish with AMPure bead cleanup using 5-minute room temperature incubation followed by magnetic separation and elution in RSB buffer with 2-minute incubation and 4-minute final magnetic separation at 5mm height.

SETTING THERMO and TEMP BLOCK Temperature
